title: JBCクラシックの後に・先駆けの刻印

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey got a taste of the passion her
rivals put into their racing, but she didn't fold
under the pressure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having left them with a lasting impression, she
stands ready to take on the Champions Cup.
